title: John Forney
compiled_truth: John Forney is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-06-15 to 2001-11-07), John Forney sent 79 and received 207 emails, totalling 286 interactions. Top correspondents: [Portland Shift](people/portland-shift) (40), [Joan Quick](people/joan-quick) (6), [Don Baughman](people/don-baughman) (3), [Portland Desk](people/portland-desk) (3), [Mark Guzman](people/mark-guzman) (3).
